reason: Response B shows more craft and varied rhythm characteristic of a stronger model: vivid, specific phrasing ("come back swinging," "delays are not defeats," concrete diagnostic questions like nerves/time management), and a more natural conversational opener. Response A is competent but more generic and template-like, leaning on familiar inspirational cliches ("setback, not an ending") that read as the safer, smaller-model output. The greater specificity and tonal control in B point to Sonnet over Haiku.
